task_completion.description: EdrawMax application is opened and a canvas is active.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The EdrawMax application interface is visible on the screen with an active drawing canvas.

task_completion.description: The required header and subtitle are present on the dashboard.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Text elements reading 'Executive Sales Overview - Q3 2025' and 'July 1 - September 30, 2025' are visible, typically at the top of the canvas.

task_completion.description: Four KPI cards are created with the specified metrics.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Four distinct sections or cards are visible displaying: Revenue ($4,250,000, +12.5%), Gross Margin (68%, -2.1%), New Customers (142, +8), and Avg Deal Size ($29,500, Flat).

task_completion.description: A bar chart for Revenue by Region is included.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A bar chart titled 'Revenue by Region' is visible on the canvas, showing categories for North, South, East, and West.

task_completion.description: A donut or pie chart for Sales by Product is included.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A circular chart (pie or donut) titled 'Sales by Product' is visible, with segments labeled for SaaS Platform, On-Premise, and Services.

task_completion.description: The dashboard is saved as an EDDX file in the Documents folder.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As' dialog showing 'sales_dashboard.eddx' in the /home/ga/Documents/ directory, or the EdrawMax window title updating to 'sales_dashboard', or a file manager showing the saved file.

task_completion.description: The dashboard is exported as a PNG image in the Documents folder.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An 'Export' dialog showing 'sales_dashboard.png' being saved to /home/ga/Documents/, or a file manager showing the resulting .png file.

integrity.description: The agent used the EdrawMax GUI to construct the dashboard.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with EdrawMax menus, toolbars, and canvas elements rather than a script or text editor.

integrity.description: The agent actually built charts and cards, not just a plain text list.
integrity.visual_evidence: The canvas contains graphical elements like bars, pie slices, and distinct text boxes/shapes, rather than a single block of text containing the required numbers.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal commands to spoof the output files.
integrity.visual_evidence: The terminal is not used to run commands like 'touch /home/ga/Documents/sales_dashboard.eddx' or 'echo ... > sales_dashboard.png'.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected output files are '/home/ga/Documents/sales_dashboard.eddx' and '/home/ga/Documents/sales_dashboard.png'. The dashboard must contain the following specific strings: 'Executive Sales Overview', '4,250,000', '68%', '142', '29,500', 'Revenue by Region', and 'SaaS Platform'.
